snowflake.label: Snowflake focus
snowflake.plan_line: Snowflake for live metrics and warehouse-backed evidence.
snowflake.base_notes: Query live metrics via the Snowflake MCP server. Prefer semantic views and curated marts when they cover the question; else query staging tables. Verify objects live (describe_semantic_view / SHOW TABLES / DESCRIBE) before querying. Read-only — the server's SQL statement allowlist permits SELECT/DESCRIBE/SHOW/USE only, never ALTER/DELETE/DROP.
